safe_interpretation: At calibrated agreement-recall targets, the measured latency/quality/memory trade-offs support the per-scenario method recommendations.
unsafe_interpretation_to_avoid: Claiming one index method is universally best regardless of catalog size, embedding, or serving constraints.

claim_strength_allowed: strong within the four evaluated catalogs
safe_interpretation: Findings hold across ML-1M, ML-20M, GoodBooks and Amazon Books under one protocol; Amazon Books rows are complete in the main evidence.
unsafe_interpretation_to_avoid: Citing Amazon Books scale without complete amazon-books main rows, or extrapolating beyond the evaluated catalog sizes.

claim_strength_allowed: strong (both modalities measured under one protocol)
safe_interpretation: ANN effects are reported separately for U2I and I2I; differences between modalities are measured on the same split and seed.
unsafe_interpretation_to_avoid: Generalizing a modality-specific finding to 'recommendation quality' in general.

safe_interpretation: Paired bootstrap CIs/p-values (2000 iterations) plus paired Cohen's d and Cliff's delta against the exact Flat baseline.
unsafe_interpretation_to_avoid: Reporting significance from fewer than the contracted 2000 bootstrap iterations, or unpaired comparisons.

safe_interpretation: The ANN method *ranking* stability across backbones (including BPR and all five methods) indicates whether conclusions survive an embedding swap; stability values are reported honestly.
unsafe_interpretation_to_avoid: Claiming the benchmark evaluates neural recommenders, or citing the check without BPR rows and all five methods.

safe_interpretation: PQ reconstruction error, neighbor overlap, and popularity-decile effects are measured; quality deltas carry diagnostic labels.
unsafe_interpretation_to_avoid: Asserting that PQ acts as implicit regularization; only 'compression_may_smooth_noise' evidence labels are supported.

claim_strength_allowed: strong for the proxy (top-k slot exposure)
safe_interpretation: long_tail_exposure / long_tail_uplift quantify how index choice shifts top-k slot exposure toward or away from tail items, on the complete exposure analysis with an explicit fairness_scope field.
unsafe_interpretation_to_avoid: Equating slot-exposure proxies with realized user impressions, position-weighted attention, or a full fairness evaluation.

claim_strength_allowed: moderate for cost, none for quality
safe_interpretation: Build time, index size, RSS, and calibrated latency are measured on the complete 20-cell synthetic grid up to 1M items at d=128 (quality_measured=false on every row).
unsafe_interpretation_to_avoid: Claiming recommendation quality at production scale; real datasets top out at ML-20M/Amazon Books.

safe_interpretation: All canonical experiments ran on CPU; accelerator presence is disclosed passively and main_experiments_accelerator_used=false.
unsafe_interpretation_to_avoid: Citing any GPU behavior, or omitting the CPU-only boundary when discussing latency.
